name: MyClipboard
short_description: Clipboard Manager is a smart and efficient Windows clipboard manager that displays your copied text, images, files and more. Instantly access your history with a keyboard shortcut, search content, edit images, track sources, and back up your clipboard. Stay organized and productive !
detailed_description:
MyClipboard is a powerful, lightweight, silent and user-friendly Windows clipboard manager that gives you full control over your copied content

Access your clipboard history instantly and stay organized

  • Quick Access with Shortcuts: Open the app anytime using a customizable keyboard shortcut to quickly retrieve previous clipboard items

  • Smart Clipboard History: Automatically display copied text, images, files and more in a clean, organized interface

  • Favorites System: Pin important clipboard items to access them instantly anytime

  • Search Functionality: Easily search through your clipboard history to find exactly what you need

  • Blacklist System: Exclude specific apps or content types from being saved

  • Source Provider Tracking: Instantly see where each clipboard item originated

  • Built-in Image Editor: Edit copied images directly within the app

  • Clipboard Backup: Securely save and restore your clipboard history

supported_languages: English, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Ukrainian
